plan.summary: Split analyze_project profile extraction, persistence, summary, fs, and import-count helpers out of project-tools.ts while preserving the public tool facade and removing the static index-tools dependency.

prove.blind_audit: clean:strict via independent CQ auditor after test strengthening; no actionable findings remained in the scoped boundary tests
prove.adversarial: completed: adversarial-review.sh --rotate --mode code on staged diff; earlier critical/warning findings drove fixes for importer counting, pyproject detection, root entrypoints, Hono source precedence, git remote sanitization, atomic writes, import parsing, shortlog isolation, and summary/test-path resilience
prove.findings_disposition: fixed: high/critical issues introduced or exposed inside the refactor fence. preserved/accepted: readJson remains graceful on malformed JSON to preserve pre-refactor behavior; extractDependencyGraph keeps a sync default for exported API compatibility while analyzeProject passes the async full-file importer count; broader non-JS/PHP/Python dependency graph semantics remain out of this split's scope.
